name: Todo App
description: Task management with lists, priorities, due dates, and swipe actions.
ai_context: This is an Expo (React Native) todo app. Single-file App.js contains all logic using React Native components (View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, etc.) and StyleSheet. Features: add tasks with title/priority/list, multiple lists (All, Personal, Work, Shopping) as filter tabs, priority levels (high/medium/low) with color dots, mark complete with checkbox, delete tasks, progress bar, task count. All data in AsyncStorage. Mobile-first design using React Native — runs on iOS, Android, and web. The user will likely ask to: add due dates with date picker, add subtasks, add drag-and-drop reordering, add notifications/reminders, add categories, add search, add swipe-to-delete gesture, add animations, add sync across devices, add share lists, etc.
